zh.lifeSummary: 當John d'Oyley of Raunton於大約1195年出生在英國素福爾可萊塔姆時，他的父親Wakelin d'Oyly12歲，母親Agnes de Grey22歲。他於大約1247年與Rose de Dunston結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1267年在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John d'Oyley of Raunton于大约1195年出生在英国素福爾可萊塔姆时，他的父亲Wakelin d'Oyly12岁，母亲Agnes de Grey22岁。他于大约1247年与Rose de Dunston结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1267年在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Oyley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Olley with fused Old French preposition d' ‘from’.

variants.name: Olley
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of   Oley   2, a habitational name of Norman origin, from any of the five places called Ouilly in Calvados, France.

variants.name: Dilley
meanings: English: possibly a pet form of an unrecorded Old English personal name Dylla, found as the first element in the placenames Dillington (in the former Huntingdonshire) and Dilton (in Wiltshire). The name may sometimes have been confused with Doyley and Dolley (see Olley ).
German: variant of   Dilly   or a surname of French origin, an altered form of   Delay  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Dilly  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John d'Oyley of Raunton was born about 1195, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England, his father, Wakelin d'Oyly, was 12 and his mother, Agnes de Grey, was 22. He married Rose de Dunston about 1247. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died about 1267, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John d'Oyley of Raunton est né environ 1195, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Wakelin d'Oyly, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Grey, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Rose de Dunston environ 1247. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé environ 1267, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John d'Oyley of Raunton um 1195 in Wrentham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wakelin d'Oyly 12 und seine Mutter Agnes de Grey 22. Er hat um 1247 Rose de Dunston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb um 1267 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John d'Oyley of Raunton è nato il circa 1195 nel Wrentham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Wakelin d'Oyly, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Grey, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Rose de Dunston circa 1247. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì circa 1267, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John d'Oyley of Rauntonが約1195年にイギリススフォルクウレンサムで生まれた時，父Wakelin d'Oylyは12歳，母Agnes de Greyは22歳であった。約1247年にRose de Dunstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は約1267年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John d'Oyley of Raunton(이)가 대략 1195년 영국 수폴크 렌섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wakelin d'Oyly(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Grey(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1247년 Rose de Dunston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1267년 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John d'Oyley of Raunton nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Wakelin d'Oyly, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Grey, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Rose de Dunston aproximadamente 1247. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1267, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John d'Oyley of Raunton родился около 1195 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Wakelin d'Oyly было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Grey, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Rose de Dunston около 1247 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер около 1267 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

sm.about 1195–about 1267: e tusa o le 1195–e tusa o le 1267

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John d'Oyley of Raunton nació aproximadamente 1195, en Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Wakelin d'Oyly, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Agnes de Grey, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Rose de Dunston aproximadamente 1247. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1267, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
